description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a gable roof and a mix of brick and glass exterior walls. The property features a driveway with a parked car, a rectangular swimming pool, and a detached garage structure. The landscaping includes several trees and manicured grass lawns, with paved walkways connecting the main entrance, garage, and pool area. Large windows and glass doors provide ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic, while pink shutters add a touch of color to the facade. The rooftop includes a terrace area with outdoor seating, and the overall layout is open and spacious, suitable for urban residential neighborhoods.
description: A modern two-story brick and glass house with a gable roof, large windows, a pool, detached garage, and landscaped yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway with car, gable roof, and a clear view of the pool and garage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pool, terrace, large windows, and the open backyard area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, pool, garage, and additional landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the glass entryway, pink shutters, and front yard landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a large glass door with adjacent windows, paved steps, and minimal decorative elements.
